news.headline: Net Asset Value as at 31 Jan 2025 for Volta Finance Limited (VTA/VTAS) released in January 2025 monthly report.
news.summary: Volta Finance Limited (VTA / VTAS) has released its January 2025 monthly report. This information is not intended for release, distribution, or publication in whole or part in or into the United States.

news.headline: US Middle East Envoy Witkoff: Trump's Gaza plan is not an eviction plan for Palestinians.

Toast Inc (NYSE:TOST) reported Q4 revenue beat of $1.338 billion, driving analysts' optimism for 2025 growth. Analysts vary in rating and price targets. Sector Perfor maintained by RBC Capital Markets, Market Perform by Keefe Bruyette & Woods, and Buy by Needham with varying price targets. Financial Technology Solutions contributed $1,090 million in revenue, and Subscription Services added $200 million. Market responds with shares tanking in early trading. Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Toast Inc (NYSE:TOST) saw a significant drop in shares during early trading on Thursday due to their mixed fourth-quarter results. Analysts had differing opinions on the situation.RBC Capital Markets analyst Daniel Perlin confirmed a Sector Perform rating. Meanwhile, Keefe Bruyette & Woods analyst Sanjay Sakhrani kept a Market Perform rating but raised the price target from $40 to $42. Needham analyst Mayank Tandon retained a Buy rating with a price target of $50.According to Perlin, Toast reported revenues totaling $1.338 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $111 million. This surpassed the Street's expectations of $1.318 billion in revenue and $101 million in adjusted EBITDA. Perlin noted that Financial Technology Solutions contributed $1,090 million in revenue, while Subscription Services added $200 million.For more analyst ratings and detailed information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: American Foundation for Suicide Prevention organizes Out of the Darkness Campus Walks in Illinois to combat suicide.
news.summary: In a concerted effort against suicide, various high school and college communities in Illinois are uniting to participate in the Out of the Darkness Campus Walk. This event will bring together students, faculty, and staff members to raise awareness and support suicide prevention initiatives. Scheduled for February 20, 2025, in Chicago, this initiative aims to promote mental health and well-being among individuals aged 14 to 24. With the participation of numerous schools, the event is set to attract a large number of attendees, emphasizing the importance of collective action in combating suicide.

news.headline: Bestqool upgrades Pro100 and Pro200 to Pro300 with four-wavelength setup (630 nm, 660 nm, 850 nm, 940 nm) at original price.
news.summary: In a recent update, Bestqool has announced the enhancement of its Pro100 and Pro200 models to now become the Pro300, featuring a four-wavelength configuration including 630 nm, 660 nm, 850 nm, and 940 nm. This upgrade does not come with a price increase, providing customers with improved functionality at no additional cost. Alongside this development, Bestqool has also introduced other innovations as part of its latest offerings.

news.headline: New unit launched by SEC to combat crypto crime.
news.summary: A recent report shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in the past 10 years. This decline in unemployment has resulted in over 300,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the report highlights a significant increase in average hourly wages by 3.5% compared to last year. Experts attribute this positive trend to the continuous growth in various sectors of the economy, particularly in technology and healthcare. Young adults aged 20-24 seem to have benefited the most from this job growth, with a decrease in unemployment rates in this demographic reaching 6.1%. Despite these improvements, there are concerns about the sustainability of this trend due to various economic challenges faced by the country.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: Mexico's reliance on US natural gas to grow amid rising trade tensions.
Trump claims authority over NYC and declares ‘Long Live the King.’ - Reported by Bloomberg.
Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: Russia is willing to work with China to strengthen high-level exchanges and others - Xinhua.
US EIA reports show no Crude oil addition to the Strategic Petroleum Reserve in the latest week the for first time since December 2023 - EIA.
Airspan to acquire Corning's wireless business, including 6000 & 6200 DAS systems. Deal expected to close in Q1 2025.
news.summary: Airspan Networks Holdings LLC, a prominent wireless network solutions provider, has revealed its plan to acquire the wireless business of Corning Incorporated. The agreement is in its final stages and is projected to finalize by Q1 2025, pending regulatory approval. Corning’s wireless division includes the acclaimed 6000 and 6200 distributed antenna systems (DAS) in addition to the SpiderCloud 4G and 5G small cell radio access technology. This strategic move by Airspan signifies a significant development in the realm of wireless networking solutions.

news.headline: The Doux partners with MC Lyte for "1 of 1" Tour as official beauty sponsor. Fastest-growing hair care brand in U.S.
news.summary: In Atlanta on February 20, 2025, The Doux, a leading textured hair care brand in the U.S., revealed its collaboration with iconic hip-hop artist MC Lyte as the endorsed beauty sponsor for her upcoming "1 of 1" Tour. With a reputation for uniting hip-hop influences with beauty trends, The Doux presents this partnership with great enthusiasm as they represent the fastest-growing brand in the textured hair care sector, further solidifying their position in the market.

news.headline: Positive preclinical data on Anti-IL-7 receptor Lusvertikimab for Chronic Colitis presented at 20th ECCO Congress.
news.summary: OSE Immunotherapeutics shared promising preclinical findings regarding the combination therapy of Lusvertikimab, an anti-IL-7 receptor, in chronic colitis during an oral presentation at the 20th Congress of ECCO. The presentation highlighted encouraging results from the preclinical studies, indicating the potential efficacy of the combination treatment. The data presented at the congress underscored the significant impact of this therapy in addressing chronic colitis, hinting at a positive development for patients suffering from this condition.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: There are scenarios where progress on inflation stalls, or inflation rises alongside a weakening labor market.
Fed's Musalem: Inflation expectations have moved higher, which would make the Fed's job more difficult if sustained.
Garrett Motion Inc. reported Q4 sales down 11% to $844 million, missing consensus of $860.5 million. EPS beat at 47 cents. Adjusted EBITDA increased to $153 million.
news.summary: Garrett Motion Inc. reported a decline in fourth-quarter sales, dropping by 11% year over year to $844 million, or down 10% on a constant currency basis, missing the consensus of $860.5 million. The decrease was attributed to reduced diesel production in Europe and weaker gasoline demand in China and North America. Gross profit amounted to $182 million, compared to $189 million the previous year, resulting in a gross profit margin of 21.6%, up from 20.0% a year ago. Earnings per share stood at 47 cents, surpassing the consensus of 29 cents. Adjusted EBITDA rose to $153 million from $145 million in the prior year, driven by enhanced variable and fixed cost productivity, reductions in commodity and transportation costs, energy deflation, and a favorable product mix. Operating cash flow showed positive trends.

news.headline: Fed's Musalem: Assurance inflation is returning to the 2% target is needed before further policy changes. A patient approach is appropriate.
Fed's Musalem My baseline is for inflation to return to 2%, but risks are skewed to the upside.
Adaptiva named Representative Vendor in Gartner "Market Guide for Endpoint Management Tools." Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Adaptiva, a renowned company in autonomous endpoint management based in Kirkland, Washington, declared that it had been recognized as a Representative Vendor in the Gartner "Market Guide for Endpoint Management Tools." Gartner, a leading research and advisory company, recommends IT leaders to consider the insights provided in the guide for effective management of endpoints. This recognition solidifies Adaptiva's position in the industry and highlights its expertise and innovation in this field.

news.headline: Alabama Power and E Source awarded for innovative data analytics system by US DOE for improved service reliability.
news.summary: A partnership between The Southern Company utility and E Source has led to the development of an innovative predictive power mapping data system aimed at enhancing service reliability. The collaboration, based in Boulder, Colorado, was recognized on Feb. 20, 2025, as E Source and Alabama Power were awarded the prestigious U.S. Department of Energy's Digitizing Utilities Prize. This recognition highlights the significant advancements made in the utilities sector to strengthen operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: INMOTION unveils V9 - electric unicycle raising industry bar; upgrades in safety and intelligence.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, INMOTION Technologies Co., Ltd., based in Shenzhen, China, unveiled the V9 electric unicycle, a pioneering product redefining industry benchmarks. Primed to elevate safety and intelligence in personal mobility, the V9 is set to revolutionize the market as the latest innovation from the global leader in this sector.

news.headline: Trump aluminum tariffs to hit 123 areas, including chip equipment - Nikkei.
Interlynk chosen by AiDash for cybersecurity compliance, including PCI DSS and EU Cyber Resilience Act.
news.summary: A California-based company, Interlynk, specializing in SBOM solutions, has been chosen by AiDash, a major climate-tech firm, to improve regulatory compliance. This includes meeting standards like the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) and the European Union’s Cyber Resilience Act (CRA). The partnership will involve Interlynk offering AiDash services for SBOM generation, AI-powered vulnerability assessment, and overall compliance monitoring. This decision signifies a significant step for AiDash in ensuring adherence to regulatory standards and enhancing cybersecurity.

news.headline: Elasticsearch Open Inference API now supports Jina AI's models, benefiting developers with multilingual tools and performance.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) unveiled that the Elasticsearch Open Inference API now backs Jina AI's updated embedding models and reranking products. This collaboration equips developers using the Elasticsearch vector database for creating semantic search and RAG applications with Jina AI's cutting-edge tools designed for GenAI information retrieval and semantic applications. Notably, the integration encompasses assistance for multilingual text embeddings and multitasking capabilities.

news.headline: Riverbed reveals global top partners of the year.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global carbon dioxide emissions have reached an all-time high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2019. This represents a 0.6% increase from the previous year. The increase in emissions was primarily driven by the energy sector, which saw a rise of 2.9%. The report also highlighted that China remains the largest emitter of carbon dioxide, accounting for 28% of global emissions, followed by the United States at 15% and the European Union at 9%. These numbers underscore the urgent need for immediate action to curb carbon emissions and combat climate change.

news.headline: Symbiotic Security enhances software security with updates to application and IDE extension, aiding developer visibility.
news.summary: Symbiotic Security, based in New York, released important updates to its application and Integrated Development Environment (IDE) extension. These updates aim to enhance security measures for developers.

news.headline: Haffner Energy and ATOBA Energy collaborate to advance SAF market, securing long-term offtake agreements for growth.
news.summary: In an exciting development, ATOBA Energy and Haffner Energy have joined forces in Vitry-le-François and Lyon, France, to expand the production of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF). This partnership aims to ramp up SAF production by securing bankable contracts for long-term off-take agreements, which will facilitate financing and propel the growth of the SAF market. This collaboration is set to significantly boost SAF production, contributing to the sustainable aviation industry's expansion.

news.headline: AIQ+ enhances talent evaluation with AI, offering instant predictive analysis. Users access key data points easily.
news.summary: A revolutionary development in intelligence and performance assessment has been introduced in Ann Arbor, Michigan. AIQ+ is a cutting-edge tool providing real-time predictive analysis to front offices, coaches, and players, seamlessly integrating into all evaluation and development procedures. This innovation merges player AIQ scores with a vast language model to review data and detect trends. By using basic prompts like "TELL ME ABOUT" or "HOW DO I DEVELOP," users can swiftly access crucial data points including Field P.

news.headline: EcoTrove’s AI Energy Agent reduces power bills and offers a Netflix-style subscription model.
news.summary: In San Francisco, EcoTrove has developed an AI Energy Agent that reduces power bills and transforms them into a subscription service similar to Netflix. This innovative technology aims to provide consumers with cost savings on their energy expenses.

news.headline: 2025 Game Developers Choice Awards honors Sam Lake with Lifetime Achievement Award, Lucas Pope with Pioneer Award.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the upcoming Game Developers Choice Awards will recognize writer and director Sam Lake with the distinguished Lifetime Achievement Award. Additionally, renowned designer Lucas Pope is set to be honored with the prestigious Pioneer Award for his significant contributions to the industry. These awards highlight the exceptional talents and impactful work of Lake and Pope in the gaming sector.

news.headline: Genesis partners with NBC series "Suits LA," featuring GV80 Coupe and G90. Partnership begins Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Fountain Valley, California on February 20, 2025, Genesis revealed its collaboration with an undisclosed entity. This partnership will showcase Genesis vehicles in the upcoming series, highlighting the GV80 Coupe and G90 models. Additionally, viewers can expect tailored advertising content in the series, featuring Lex Scott Davis.

news.headline: Broadcom founder, Henry Samueli, receives 2025 IEEE Medal of Honor with a record $2 million prize for his work in broadband tech, transforming communication and networking.
news.summary: Pioneering research conducted by Samueli has revolutionized societal communications, connections, and business operations through the commercialization of broadband communication and networking technologies. Located in Piscataway, N.J., these advancements have significantly impacted various aspects of society. This breakthrough was announced on February 20, 2025, by IEEE, the biggest technical professional organization globally.

news.headline: SchoolsFirst FCU donates over $220,000 to members and schools affected by SoCal wildfires. Support and care extended.
news.summary: A credit union located in Tustin, California, has recently pledged over $220,000 in financial aid to assist individuals in need. SchoolsFirst Federal Credit Union shared on Feb. 20, 2025, that they are offering this support to their Members and the local educational community. The donations are aimed at providing assistance to those facing financial challenges and aiding the educational sector.

news.headline: Veren Inc. will announce Q4 & full year 2024 results on Feb. 27, 2025, before markets open.
news.summary: Veren Inc., a leading company based in Calgary, AB, is set to disclose its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 through a press release on Thursday, February 27, 2025, ahead of market opening. Trading under the tickers VRN on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), Veren's report will provide an insight into its performance over the past year. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating the release of these significant figures and metrics.

news.headline: Certling uses AI for affordable certified translations ahead of the 2026 Football World Cup, reducing costs.
news.summary: In Canterbury, England, on February 20, 2025, a notable translation platform called Certling has unveiled a cutting-edge solution to lower certified translation expenses as the 2026 Football World Cup approaches in North America. This innovative tool aims to address the rising demand for translations, especially in light of immigration specialists projecting a notable surge in visa applications. The platform comes at a crucial time, potentially helping to minimize costs for certified translations leading up to the global event.

news.headline: Private Advisor Group in Morristown, NJ expands Advisor Engagement program to offer strategic guidance and resources.*Claim: one of the largest, fastest-growing independent wealth management firms in the country.
news.summary: In Morristown, New Jersey on February 20, 2025, Private Advisor Group disclosed the enhancement of its Advisor Engagement program. The program aims to offer more comprehensive strategic advice and customized resources to financial advisors. Private Advisor Group is recognized as one of the leading and rapidly growing independent wealth management firms in the nation. *According to the latest available data, it is noted for being among the largest and swiftest expanding firms in the industry.

news.headline: Sedgwick acquires legal spend management business from Bottomline, a global leader in business payments.
news.summary: A global claims management and business solutions provider, Sedgwick, based in Memphis, Tennessee, announced on February 20, 2025, their agreement to acquire Bottomline, a key player in business payments and cash management. This strategic acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, positioning Sedgwick to enhance its services and offerings. The deal signifies a milestone for both companies, showcasing their commitment to growth and innovation in the market.

Haffner Energy and ATOBA Energy partner to boost SAF production, securing offtake agreements and scaling market.
news.summary: Through a new strategic partnership, long-term offtake agreements have been secured, paving the way for accelerated scale-up of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) production. This collaboration not only unlocks financing opportunities but also ensures the sustained growth of SAF production.

news.headline: Mortgage rates decrease as 30-year FRM averages 6.85% according to Freddie Mac's PMMS® for Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in McLean, Virginia, Freddie Mac (OTCQB: FMCC) published findings from its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®), revealing that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stood at 6.85%.

news.headline: Company's ownership structure changes as new holder(s) emerge, impacting # of shares held.
Actress Julianne Moore, Gov. Chris Christie, and Arne Duncan join Northwell Health’s Gun Violence Prevention Forum. 41,000 Americans died from gun-related incidents last year.
news.summary: In New Hyde Park, N.Y., amid a shift in leadership and policies, gun violence continues to be the primary cause of death among children and teenagers in the U.S. Despite a slight over five percent decrease in firearm-related deaths from the previous year, the toll remains strikingly high, with nearly 41,000 American fatalities attributed to gun-related homicides, suicides, and accidental shootings in the last year. In an effort to address this ongoing issue, Northwell Health, the largest health system in New York, is reassembling to explore potential solutions.

Skillfully launches "SkillsOS" AI suite for skills-based hiring, improves candidate validation and hiring decisions. (Character count: 111)
news.summary: Skillfully, a prominent company in skills-based hiring, has released a new suite of AI-powered products in San Francisco on February 20, 2025. This innovative offering assists employers in verifying candidates' skills, enabling them to enhance their hiring process and make quicker decisions. The advancement is aimed at facilitating more efficient hiring practices, ultimately benefiting both employers and job seekers.
